name: chr1q12_pericentric_HSat2_HSat3
description: Chromosome 1 q-arm pericentric heterochromatin block (1q12), composed of human satellite 2 (HSat2; CATTC/GGAAT pentamer-based) and human satellite 3 (HSat3; ATTCC-based) tandem arrays. Largely unassembled in GRCh38; fully resolved only in T2T-CHM13. Stains as a prominent C-band; harbours classical satellite 2/3 polymorphisms.

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem arrays of HSat2 (CATTC/GGAAT-rich pentamers) and HSat3 (ATTCC-rich); long monotonous blocks at >95% identity; the largest classical heterochromatin block in the genome.

related_diseases: ICF syndrome (DNMT3B/ZBTB24/CDCA7/HELLS hypomethylation; instability at 1q12 and 16q11)
